title: [DEPRECATED] Create: Crafts & Construct
description: Create-Mod addon that adds new Recipes and more stuff to the Game
body:
![Create: Crafts&Construct](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dff6a038edde26d36e27198d2f747dbe708de61d.png)


![BC-MODS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1b240e165790e28e94fa71a52a51a7bd05f885d.png)

**Crafts and Construct is an Create-Addon that adds new automated recipes and Blocks for the Create-Mod.**

There are automated recipes for Dragon Breath, Tuff, Calcite, Asurine, Veridium, Ochrum, Crimsite,...
This Mod also adds Gummy bears and Textile blocks!

![Textile Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f3142f3a57f321529985226b3bc9251bb167f13.png)

![BC-MODS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1b240e165790e28e94fa71a52a51a7bd05f885d.png)

![Some Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1436f70931b8bd9d9d0c880e1b274297161c40d4.png)

**This Mod is still Work In Progress!**

-_Upcoming updates will introduce new items and blocks, along with ways to recycle existing items and blocks..._

-_Soon: v2 Update with NeoForge 1.21.1 Release_

![BC-MODS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1b240e165790e28e94fa71a52a51a7bd05f885d.png)
